name: IdsEdwBFeeDscntIncmFBal

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.X1_TMP_IdsEdwBFeeDscntIncmFBal; SELECT FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.SRC_SYS_CD, FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.BILL_INVC_ID, FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.FEE_DSCNT_ID, FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.INVC_FEE_DSCNT_BILL_DISP_CD, FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.INVC_FEE_DSCNT_SRC_CD, FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.GRP_ID, FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.SUBGRP_ID, FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.CLS_ID, FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.CLS_PLN_ID, FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.PROD_ID, FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.FEE_DSCNT_AMT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.X1_TMP_IdsEdwBFeeDscntIncmFBal FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.B_FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F B_FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F ON FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.SRC_SYS_CD = B_FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.SRC_SYS_CD AND FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.BILL_INVC_ID = B_FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.BILL_INVC_ID AND FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.FEE_DSCNT_ID = B_FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.FEE_DSCNT_ID AND FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.INVC_FEE_DSCNT_BILL_DISP_CD = B_FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.INVC_FEE_DSCNT_BILL_DISP_CD AND FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.INVC_FEE_DSCNT_SRC_CD = B_FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.INVC_FEE_DSCNT_SRC_CD AND FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.GRP_ID = B_FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.GRP_ID AND FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.SUBGRP_ID = B_FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.SUBGRP_ID AND FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.CLS_ID = B_FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.CLS_ID AND FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.CLS_PLN_ID = B_FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.CLS_PLN_ID AND FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.PROD_ID = B_FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.PROD_ID WHERE FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} AND FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.FEE_DSCNT_AMT <> B_FEE_DSCNT_INCM_F.FEE_DSCNT_AMT; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.X2_TMP_IdsEdwBFeeDscntIncmFBal_NOTIFY; WITH cte AS ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.X1_TMP_IdsEdwBFeeDscntIncmFBal ) SELECT 'COLUMN SUM BALANCING IDS - EDW FEE DSCNT INCM F OUT OF TOLERANCE' AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.X2_TMP_IdsEdwBFeeDscntIncmFBal_NOTIFY FROM cte WHERE cte.cnt >= 1
